mapper.select: select case gender when 1 then '男性员工' when 2 then '女性员工' end as name, count(*) as value from emp group by gender
select case job when 1 then '班主任' when 2 then '讲师' when 3 then '学工主管' when 4 then '教研主管' when 5 then '咨询师' else '未分配' end as jobName, count(*) as cnt from emp group by job
select case degree when 1 then '初中' when 2 then '高中' when 3 then '大专' when 4 then '本科' when 5 then '硕士' when 6 then '博士' else '其他' end as name, count(*) as value from student group by degree
select c.name as clazz, count(s.id) as data from student s left join clazz c on s.clazz_id = c.id group by c.id, c.name
